recommendations.title: Shadow in the Cloud
recommendations.overview: A WWII pilot traveling with top secret documents on a B-17 Flying Fortress encounters an evil presence on board the flight.

recommendations.title: Daddy, I'm a Zombie
recommendations.overview: The misadventures of a teenager girl in her new life as zombie.

recommendations.title: The Flight Before Christmas
recommendations.overview: A young reindeer named Niko dreams about flying like his father, whom he has never met. Despite constant teasing from others, he sneaks out of his home valley to take flying lessons from Julius, a flying squirrel.

recommendations.title: Singh Is Kinng
recommendations.overview: A comic caper about Happy Singh, a Punjabi villager who goes through a series of misadventures and eventually becomes the King of the Australian underworld.

recommendations.title: Firebird
recommendations.overview: At the height of the Cold War, a troubled soldier forms a forbidden love triangle with a daring fighter pilot and his female comrade amid the dangerous surroundings of a Soviet Air Force Base.

recommendations.title: About Elly
recommendations.overview: The mysterious disappearance of a kindergarten teacher during a picnic in the north of Iran is followed by a series of misadventures for her fellow travelers.

recommendations.title: Day & Night
recommendations.overview: When Day, a sunny fellow, encounters Night, a stranger of distinctly darker moods, sparks fly! Day and Night are frightened and suspicious of each other at first, and quickly get off on the wrong foot. But as they discover each other's unique qualiti

recommendations.title: TransSiberian
recommendations.overview: A TransSiberian train journey from China to Moscow becomes a thrilling chase of deception and murder when an American couple encounters a mysterious pair of fellow travelers.

recommendations.title: And Now for Something Completely Different
recommendations.overview: A collection of Monty Python's Flying Circus skits from the first two seasons of their British TV series.

recommendations.title: A Dirty Carnival
recommendations.overview: A small-time thug who collects debts for the local triad is torn between his criminal aspirations and his devotion to family.
